side.headline: One app for the whole building
side.sub: Log in with the access code you got from your committee or building manager.

demo.title: Log in
demo.intro: Demo mode, no backend connected. Pick a role and explore the app through their eyes.
demo.exitLink: I have an account, log in to my building

form.subRegister: Create an account using the access code from your committee or manager.
form.subForgot: We'll email you a link to set a new password.
form.switchToRegister: Sign up with an access code
form.infoResetSent: We've emailed you a link to set a new password.

code.title: Join a building
code.intro: Your account isn't linked to a building yet. Enter the access code from your committee or manager.

reset.title: New password
reset.intro: Set a new password for your Tasker Living account.
reset.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset.errorChangeFailed: Couldn't change the password. Open the link from the email again.
